eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Alpine, CA; Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 9:34 AM on MAR 20, 2019 Effective until 9:49 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Storey County authorities have issued a Required Weekly Test for Douglas, Carson City, Storey, Lyon, and  Alpine Counties. This is only a test. No Action Required
